HERMES_WEBUI_PORT.description: Host loopback port hermes-webui binds on. NPM proxies the public `chat.<publicDomain>` down to this port behind Authelia forward-auth. Default 8787 matches the upstream default; pick something else if you've already taken 8787.

HERMES_WEBUI_PASSWORD.description: In-app password (HERMES_WEBUI_PASSWORD) — the secondary auth layer behind Authelia's forward-auth. Belt-and-suspenders: a misconfigured proxy that drops the auth wall still hits this gate before exposing chat. Auto-generated by the wizard; rotate from the wizard if it ever leaks.

HERMES_WEBUI_SUBDOMAIN.description: Subdomain for the chat surface. `chat` matches what the household stack used to point at Open WebUI (#1044); keeping it the same so existing bookmarks / family-portal links don't break. Authelia forward-auth gates every request before it lands on hermes-webui.
